name: Ren Hoshi || Loud neighbor
description:
[Any POV][⭐️] Hoshi was so touch starved it was pathetic. He couldn’t even bring himself to think about how loud he was being masturbating. Until he heard a knock on his door.

**[NSFW INTRO]** *He’s lowkey himbo coded but not really. He’s so cute I love him ToT. Was going for a kind of sunshine char x grumpy user, but you can use this prompt however :p.

Making two billion bots rn cause i’m about to be super busy🥲* **I am not responsible for anything this bot says as well as issues with speaking for you, repeating, and generally bad responses. (So don’t leave a downvote it’ll make me sad.)**
